userMessage: Give me a smart measurement workflow for the current scope context and include the flow steps using only valid TekAutomate step types.

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Added a deterministic CH1 measurement workflow using explicit MEAS1-6 slots.","findings":["Clears the scope measurement table with MEASUrement:DELETEALL before programming explicit MEAS slots.","Inferred CH1 from the current scope context."],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"s1","newStep":{"id":"g_meas_add","type":"group","label":"Smart measurement workflow","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"meas_reset","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"meas_1","type":"write","label":"Configure frequency on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:TYPe FREQUENCY;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"meas_2","type":"write","label":"Configure amplitude on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:TYPe AMPLITUDE;MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"meas_3","type":"write","label":"Configure period on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS3:TYPe PERIOD;MEASUrement:MEAS3:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"meas_4","type":"write","label":"Configure pk2pk on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS4:TYPe PK2PK;MEASUrement:MEAS4:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"meas_5","type":"write","label":"Configure mean on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS5:TYPe MEAN;MEASUrement:MEAS5:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"meas_6","type":"write","label":"Configure rms on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS6:TYPe RMS;MEASUrement:MEAS6:SOURCE CH1"}}]}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"g_meas_add","newStep":{"id":"g_meas_query","type":"group","label":"Read measurement results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"meas_q1","type":"query","label":"Query frequency result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"meas_q2","type":"query","label":"Query amplitude result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}},{"id":"meas_q3","type":"query","label":"Query period result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS3:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_period"}},{"id":"meas_q4","type":"query","label":"Query pk2pk result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS4:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_pk2pk"}},{"id":"meas_q5","type":"query","label":"Query mean result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS5:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_mean"}},{"id":"meas_q6","type":"query","label":"Query rms result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS6:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_rms"}}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Added a deterministic CH1 measurement workflow using explicit MEAS1-6 slots.
findings: Clears the scope measurement table with MEASUrement:DELETEALL before programming explicit MEAS slots.
Inferred CH1 from the current scope context.
